approvedBy: Steve full steam ahead instruction + Codex senior-engineer Foundation session
notes: Approved as a bounded no-auth Foundation DB monolith split. Scope: extract only source-backed BHAG and Agent Engine snapshot builders from lib/foundation-db.js into lib/foundation-strategy-source-snapshots.js, preserve Google source IDs/ranges/doc paths/source IDs/labels/sort orders, keep doc_source_snapshots persistence unchanged, and dogfood that old inline builder ownership fails. Not approved: broad DB rewrite, schema changes, seed changes, finance snapshot movement, source crawl/job/intelligence/shared-comms/hub changes, Marketing Video Lab wiring, paid-source auth, Meeting Vault Phase B, Drive permission mutation, or request-access emails.
